rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN P ELLIOTT VS. ZACHARY SHAFFER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 06, 2018 Line 1 . DEFENDANT SHANG CHIANG, HELEN FANG DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege any basis for contractual liability, e.g. contract between Plaintiff and owners, etc. Hearing Required to address why an OSC re: Contempt shall not be issued for Plaintiff's Counsel's failure to comply with CCP 430.41. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN P ELLIOTT VS. ZACHARY SHAFFER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 06, 2018 Line 1 . DEFENDANT SHANG CHIANG, HELEN FANG MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend as to prayer paragraphs 3, 4, and 5. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE LAP-HO WELGE-LUESSEN VS. GEORG YU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Granting Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 06, 2018 Line 2 . DEFENDANT CETN LTD., A HONG KONG CORPORATION, GEORGE YU Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Granting Leave To File Cross-Complaint DENIED. Judgment in this action was entered; no courtesy copy of the motion is provided in violation of SFLR 2.7B. Additionally, it appears, based on opposition, that proposed cross-defendant passed away. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC, VS. ANDREW LINTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 06, 2018 Line 3 . PLAINTIFF 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC, Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on March 16, 2018. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLGA BALTODANO VS. ERNESTO ALONSO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 06, 2018 Line 4 . PLAINTIFF OLGA BALTODANO Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: A-1 PROPERTY MANAGEMENT & INVESTMENTS VS. RAPHAEL M. GOINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff A-1 Property Management & Investments' 1) Response To Special Interrogatories, Set Two 2) Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, And 3) For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 06, 2018 Line 5 . DEFENDANT RAPHAEL GOINS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff A-1 Property Management & Investments' 1) Response To Special Interrogatories, Set Two 2) Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, And 3) For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. No later than March 9, 2018 Plaintiff to provide verifications, copy of the documents allegedly included with responses served on February 22, 2018; and text of the confidentiality clause references in responses. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,002. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MELI BROWN VS. PEDRO JUAREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Continue Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 06, 2018 Line 6 . PLAINTIFF MELI BROWN Notice Of Motion To Continue Trial Date OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WINTON YEE VS. DANIELLE M. FLETCHER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 06, 2018 Line 7 . DEFENDANT DANIELLE FLETCHER, HANNAH FLETCHER MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT continued to March 21, 2018. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than March 9, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)
